name: Robin Kelly
bio: Robin Kelly is a U.S. Representative from Illinois's 2nd congressional district and a leading candidate in the 2026 Democratic U.S. Senate primary. She has served in Congress since 2013 and is known for her gun violence prevention work. (Source: FEC S6IL00474; robinkelly.house.gov)
prior_office: U.S. Representative (IL-02, 2013–present); Illinois State Representative; Cook County Treasurer

jacket.note: ~$4M raised for Senate race as of Q4 2025 (The Intercept). FEC ID: S6IL00474

donors.name: Bloomberg-affiliated gun control PACs (prior House races)

career_history.highlight: Chair, House Gun Violence Prevention Task Force

policy_platform.position: Lead champion in Congress for gun control legislation; authored bills on background check reform, assault weapon restrictions.
Supports Medicare expansion; focused on maternal mortality and health equity in underserved communities.
Advocates for minimum wage increases, union rights, and investment in South Side / south suburban infrastructure.

social_pulse.summary: Positive among gun control advocates. Moderate progressive profile. Lower social media footprint compared to higher-profile Senate candidates.

trust_indicators.label: Endorsed by Everytown for Gun Safety
